query: query GetObservations($page: Int, $count: Int, $patientId: String, $category: String, $code: String) { observations(page: $page, count: $count, patientId: $patientId, category: $category, code: $code) { id resourceType status category { coding { system code display } text } code { coding { system code display } text } subject { reference display } effectiveDateTime valueQuantity { value unit system code } valueString valueBoolean component { code { coding { system code display } text } valueQuantity { value unit system code } valueString } performer { reference display } note { text } } }
